blended.narrative: Crabbe Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: light rain showers, highs of 50°F.
Thursday: 6" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
